author: anon-13168fa2
content: Expanded the API Keys and Secrets section in 03-real-world-skills/02-working-with-apis.md into a proper walkthrough. New subsections: (1) What an env var is with printenv/Get-ChildItem Env: commands to inspect current state, (2) Setting session-only vs persistent vars with OS-specific commands for bash/zsh/PowerShell and the shell config file to edit, (3) Getting a GitHub Personal Access Token with the 7-step click path including how to reuse the Phase 0 token vs create a separate one, (4) Telling the agent to read from env with explicit prompt example, (5) .env files and dotenvy/dotenv with the critical .gitignore rule and .env.example convention. Cross-references the Phase 0 PAT section and the upcoming Security chapter.
